Package index

All functions

JavaApi
R Wrapper For Googledocs Java Library
RoogleDocs
RoogleDocs
RoogleSlides
RoogleSlides
as.long_format_table()
Convert a table to long format
citation_styles()
List the supported citation styles
delete_document()
Deletes a google document by name.
delete_slides()
Deletes a google slides by name.
doc_by_id()
Get a document by id or sharing link.
doc_by_name()
Get a document by name or create a blank document if missing.
doc_from_template()
Get a document by name or create one from a template if missing.
.background_cancel_all()
Async cancel all
.background_messages()
Get background messages
ggplot_to_png()
Plot a ggplot object to a temporary file as a png
reauth()
Re-authenticate roogledocs library
roogledocs roogledocs-package
roogledocs: R Wrapper For Googledocs Java Library
search_for_documents()
Search for documents with the given title
search_for_slides()
Search for documents with the given title
slides_by_id()
Get a document by id or sharing link.
slides_by_name()
Get a document by name or create a blank document if missing.
slides_from_template()
Get a document by name or create one from a template if missing.
std_size
Standard image and paper sizes

Developed by Rob Challen.
